title: select distinct ?g where {graph ?g {?s ?p ?o}}
description:
The query:
select distinct ?g where {graph ?g {?s ?p ?o}}
on a triple store with about 600GB RAM (64 cores/ubuntu 18) and a 15 billion triple store with about two dozen graphs never completes >24 hours and still running.  However, this query:
select distinct ?g count(*) where {graph ?g {?s ?p ?o}} group by ?g order by ?g
runs in about 10 minutes
select count(*) where {graph ?g {?s ?p ?o}}  -->> runs in 1 minutes
Running develop branch:
09:32:06 OpenLink Virtuoso Universal Server
09:32:06 Version 07.20.3231-pthreads for Linux as of Mar 22 2021
09:32:06 uses OpenSSL 1.0.2n  7 Dec 2017
poc:
select count (*) from rdf_quad table option (index rdf_quad);
select count (*) from rdf_quad table option (index rdf_quad_pogs)

drop index rdf_quad_sp;
CREATE DISTINCT NO PRIMARY KEY REF COLUMN INDEX RDF_QUAD_SP  ON DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD (S, P) PARTITION (S int (0hexffff00));
key_bug_features: select distinct ?g query on large triple store
bug_feature_seed: SPARQL SELECT DISTINCT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } LIMIT 10;
SPARQL SELECT DISTINCT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } OFFSET 0;
SPARQL SELECT ?g (COUNT(*) AS ?cnt) WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } GROUP BY ?g;
SPARQL SELECT ?g (COUNT(?s) AS ?cnt) WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } GROUP BY ?g ORDER BY ?g;
SPARQL SELECT DISTINCT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } FILTER (?s != ?o) };
SPARQL SELECT DISTINCT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } FILTER EXISTS { ?s ?p ?o } };
SPARQL SELECT DISTINCT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } ORDER BY ?g;
SPARQL SELECT DISTINCT ?g WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?s ?p ?o } } LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0;
